title: Inception
overview: A thief who steals secrets through dream-sharing technology is given a final task of planting an idea into a target's subconscious.

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space to ensure humanity's survival.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime with the help of Lieutenant Jim Gordon and District Attorney Harvey Dent.

title: The Matrix
overview: A computer hacker learns about the true nature of reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

title: La La Land
overview: A jazz musician and an aspiring actress fall in love in Los Angeles while pursuing their dreams.

title: Pulp Fiction
overview: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster, and his wife intertwine in tales of violence and redemption.

title: Forrest Gump
overview: A man with low IQ recounts the events of his life that intersected with major historical events.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
overview: Two imprisoned men bond over years finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: Avengers Endgame
overview: The Avengers assemble once more to reverse the damage caused by Thanos and restore balance to the universe.

title: Titanic
overview: A seventeen year old aristocrat falls in love with a poor artist aboard the luxurious ill fated RMS Titanic.

title: The Lion King
overview: A young lion prince flees his kingdom after the murder of his father, only to learn the true meaning of responsibility.

title: Toy Story
overview: A cowboy doll feels threatened when a new spaceman action figure supplants him as a kid's favorite toy.

title: Joker
overview: A failed comedian descends into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

title: Parasite
overview: Greed and class discrimination threaten the relationship between a wealthy family and a poor family.

title: Whiplash
overview: A young drummer enrolls at a cutthroat music conservatory where his dreams are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing.

title: Gladiator
overview: A betrayed Roman general seeks revenge against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and stole his throne.

title: Coco
overview: A boy is accidentally transported to the Land of the Dead where he seeks the help of his deceased great great grandfather.

title: Doctor Strange
overview: A brilliant surgeon learns the mystic arts after a career ending accident transforms him into a master of the supernatural.

title: The Social Network
overview: Harvard student Mark Zuckerberg creates the social networking site that would become known as Facebook, facing legal battles along the way.

title: Get Out
overview: A young African American visits his white girlfriend's family estate and discovers a disturbing secret.

title: 3 Idiots
overview: Two friends search for their long lost companion, recalling their college days and the lessons learned about life and education.

title: Dangal

title: PK

title: Lagaan

title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara

title: Gully Boy
overview: A street rapper from the slums of Mumbai chases his dream of becoming a hip hop star despite a tough upbringing.

title: Andhadhun
overview: A blind pianist becomes entangled in a murder mystery after witnessing a crime he should not have been able to see.

title: Tumbbad
overview: A man chases ancient gold cursed by a forgotten god, hidden in a mythical village haunted by greed.

title: Drishyam
overview: A man goes to great lengths to protect his family after they accidentally become involved in a crime.

title: Kabir Singh

title: Sholay

title: Taare Zameen Par

title: Queen
overview: A young woman embarks on her honeymoon alone after her fiance calls off the wedding, discovering herself along the way.

title: Article 15
overview: A police officer investigates the disappearance of three girls in a village, uncovering deep rooted caste discrimination.

title: Bahubali The Beginning
overview: A young man raised by villagers discovers his royal lineage and rises to reclaim his ancestral kingdom from a tyrant.

title: Barfi
overview: A deaf and mute man navigates love and life in Darjeeling with the help of his unwavering charm and wit.

title: Lunchbox
overview: A mistaken lunchbox delivery sparks an unlikely friendship between a lonely housewife and a widower through handwritten notes.

title: Stree
overview: A small town tailor faces a mysterious supernatural force that abducts men in the night, sparing only those who hear her call.

title: Rang De Basanti
overview: A group of young friends are roped into making a patriotic film, awakening a deeper sense of duty toward their nation.

title: Swades
overview: An Indian scientist working in the United States returns to his homeland and rediscovers his roots in a rural village.

title: The Avengers
overview: Earth's mightiest heroes must come together to stop a mischievous god from enslaving humanity.

title: Spider-Man No Way Home
overview: Peter Parker seeks help from other dimensions after his identity is revealed, unleashing dangerous foes upon the multiverse.

title: The Godfather
overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his empire to his reluctant son.

title: Fight Club
overview: An insomniac office worker forms an underground fight club with a soap salesman that spirals into something much more dangerous.

title: Oppenheimer
overview: The story of American scientist J Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.
